mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO factor_snapshot (trade_date, ts_code, factor_key, params_json, output_index, factor_value, updated_at) VALUES
(#{i.tradeDate}, #{i.tsCode}, #{i.factorKey}, #{i.paramsJson}, #{i.outputIndex}, #{i.factorValue}, #{i.updatedAt})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM factor_snapshot WHERE (trade_date, ts_code, factor_key, params_json, output_index) IN
(#{i.tradeDate}, #{i.tsCode}, #{i.factorKey}, #{i.paramsJson}, #{i.outputIndex})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM factor_snapshot WHERE trade_date = #{tradeDate} AND ts_code = #{tsCode}
